name: exocortex
description: Persistent long-term memory system for AI agents. Semantic search, knowledge graphs, temporal reasoning, and self-improving retrieval across sessions.

capabilities.name: memory_storage
capabilities.description: Store and retrieve long-term knowledge with semantic search, tags, importance scoring, and knowledge tiers

capabilities.name: memory_search
capabilities.description: Hybrid semantic + keyword search with graph-aware scoring, temporal filtering, and adaptive weights

capabilities.name: knowledge_graph
capabilities.description: Entity extraction, relationship discovery, community detection, and graph-based retrieval boosting

capabilities.name: intelligence
capabilities.description: Memory consolidation, contradiction detection, temporal reasoning, and project context snapshots

capabilities.name: context_sync
capabilities.description: Export stored knowledge as .cursorrules, CLAUDE.md, or AGENTS.md for cross-tool context synchronization
